properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy taps European allies to build Freya, a cheaper Patriot-alternative to Russia’s ballistic missiles
properties.descricao: Ukraine will hold its first coalition meeting on a homegrown ballistic missile defense system in France “in the coming days.”

properties.titulo_evento: Iran attacks five Gulf nations, shuts Hormuz after US bombing: All to know
properties.descricao: Tehran hits back at several GCC countries, following the most intense US bombing since an MoU was signed last month.

properties.titulo_evento: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: US CENTCOM completes third round of strikes on Iran

properties.titulo_evento: Missiles and drones fired at Gulf states after night of US strikes on Iran
properties.descricao: Three people injured by falling shrapnel in Qatar as attacks also reported in UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman and Jordan.

properties.titulo_evento: France vs Spain World Cup semifinal: Prediction, Mbappe-Yamal, venue, stats
properties.descricao: European football titans France and Spain meet in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 final four matchup in Dallas.

properties.titulo_evento: Lindsey Graham, one of Israel’s strongest US Senate allies, dies at 71
properties.descricao: The US Republican senator died of a sudden illness, his office said. He was 71.

properties.titulo_evento: US forces launch new strikes on Iran; Tehran closes Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: US forces have launched a third round of strikes on Iran in a week.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran launches attacks across the Gulf after more US strikes
properties.descricao: Iran says it launched missile attacks on US military sites in Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and Qatar.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Jordan, Gulf states after US bombardment
properties.descricao: Fears grow of further US-Iran escalation after largest tit-for-tat attacks yet during the ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyprus -flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.

properties.titulo_evento: US Senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
properties.descricao: The influential politician had just returned from Kyiv, where he met Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky on Friday.

properties.titulo_evento: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
properties.descricao: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
properties.descricao: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.

properties.titulo_evento: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
properties.descricao: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.

properties.titulo_evento: People flee as Russian strike hits near Ukraine coffee shop
properties.descricao: Three cameras caught the moment people ducked then ran for cover in Sumy, in north eastern Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran, Tehran hits Gulf states, says Strait of Hormuz closed
properties.descricao: US and Iranian forces exchanged heavy missile and drone assaults with Tehran targeting US facilities in states across the Gulf on Sunday and saying it had again closed the vital Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian strikes kill eight in Ukraine, officials say
properties.descricao: Russia struck Ukraine with missiles, drones and guided bombs on Saturday, killing eight people and wounding dozens of others, officials said.

properties.titulo_evento: Live: US launches strikes after Iran fires on ship in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: The US military launched fresh strikes on Iran after it set a container ship ablaze on Sunday. The defence ministries of the United Arab Emirates and Qatar both said they were intercepting incoming Iranian fire. Read our blog to follow the events as...

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba suffers second nationwide blackout in five days
properties.descricao: Cuba suffered its second nationwide blackout in five days on Friday as twin energy and economic crises, worsened by a six-month US fuel blockade, continue to cripple the country's electricity grid. "The pressure is increasing," explains our journali...

properties.titulo_evento: An islandwide blackout strikes Cuba for the second time this week
properties.descricao: An islandwide blackout struck Cuba on Friday for the second time this week as the nation of nearly 10 million people grapples with a crumbling power grid and fuel shortages stemming from a U.S. energy blockade.

properties.titulo_evento: Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran supreme leader vows revenge for father's killing
properties.descricao: Iran's supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei on Saturday vowed revenge for the US-Israeli killing of his father and predecessor, hours after President Donald Trump warned against any attempt to assassinate him.

properties.titulo_evento: US Senator Lindsey Graham dies
properties.descricao: The South Carolina politician and staunch ally of Donald Trump died aged 71 after ​a brief and sudden illness, his office said. The hawkish senator backed the 2003 invasion of Iraq and the more recent war with Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Gas queues grow as Ukraine targets Russia's fuel supply
properties.descricao: Attacks by Ukraine have triggered a fuel crisis in Russia. Reports from across Russia show how residents are dealing with the disruptions in their daily lives.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz, US launches fresh strikes
properties.descricao: The Iranian navy has said it closed the Strait of Hormuz after firing on a vessel transiting an "unapproved route." In response, the US launched a third set of strikes on Iran this week. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's richest man takes on Big Tech
properties.descricao: Dieter Schwarz made his fortune from supermarkets, becoming Germany's wealthiest person. Now he wants to take on Google, Microsoft and Amazon and an entire region stands to benefit.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia hits Ukraine's Kyiv, Odesa in fresh attacks
properties.descricao: The strikes come with Ukraine running low on munitions needed to counter Russia's ballistic missiles. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy urged NATO members to deliver on promises made at the Ankara summit this week.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei vows revenge for father's killing
properties.descricao: Iran's supreme leader said Iran "demands" retribution for his father's assassination in an airstrike. Meanwhile, Trump has threatened to "completely decimate" Iran should it attempt to assassinate him.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland could cut arms aid to Ukraine as WWII spat continues
properties.descricao: As Poland observes a day of remembrance for the victims of a Ukrainian nationalist military unit, there are increasing signs that it could cut off its neighbor from military aid, even as the war against Russia continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Mayor of Berlin says he won't run for reelection
properties.descricao: Berlin Mayor Kai Wegner withdrew from the reelection race this fall. His decision to play tennis during the power outage in January was among missteps that has dented his reputation.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump signals support for Patriot production in Ukraine
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump says he may let Ukraine produce Patriot air defense missiles. Analysts welcome the move as a sign of support for the country — but warn it could take years before production begins.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine hits Russian tanker in Sea of Azov
properties.descricao: The drone attack came after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Kyiv would set up a new unit to make incursions deep in Russian territory.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches fresh strikes on Iran following attack on vessel in Hormuz strait
properties.descricao: Tehran struck back with attacks on sites in Jordan, Kuwait and Oman, further threatening the fragile ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Lindsey Graham dies at 71 after ‘brief and sudden illness,’ his office says
properties.descricao: The senator had been a been a fixture in Republican politics both in South Carolina and in Washington.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump administration panned for New York Times subpoenas
properties.descricao: Groups that advocate for reporters and Democratic senators roundly criticized the U.S. Justice Department’s move.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s supreme leader vows to avenge father’s death
properties.descricao: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public for months, and has been rumored to have been left disfigured after being injured by an airstrike.

properties.titulo_evento: How Putin Turned Japan Into a Den of Spies
properties.descricao: Operating out of a Tokyo high-rise, a military intelligence unit finds the high-tech equipment that Russia needs to wage war.

properties.titulo_evento: Inside the Secret Factory That Supplies Ukraine’s War Drones
properties.descricao: With its mass-produced and inexpensive A.I. powered war machines, the German start-up Helsing SE illustrates a profound shift in military spending.

properties.titulo_evento: How Volkswagen’s Troubles Were Made in China
properties.descricao: The German auto giant’s push into China powered it for decades, but now the company faces fierce competition from Chinese automakers in markets around the world.
